## Working session summary

Implemented and pushed the fix in commit `07084db` to `issue-4-1e8c9b0d59e2`.

PR 5 is updated and ready for review: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/5

What changed:
- Switched GitHub Pages deploy from `peaceiris/actions-gh-pages` branch publishing to the official Pages artifact flow.
- Made Pages e2e tests use the deployment output URL.
- Added workflow regression tests, troubleshooting docs, preserved case-study evidence, and template comparison data.
- Filed the matching Rust template risk upstream: https://github.com/link-foundation/rust-ai-driven-development-pipeline-template/issues/48

Verification:
- Local checks passed, including Rust tests, clippy, formatting, file-size check, workflow YAML parse, and local Playwright e2e.
- Fresh GitHub CI run `25749767225` passed on commit `07084db`.
- PR merge state is `CLEAN`; working tree is clean.

Official docs referenced for the Pages workflow: GitHub custom Pages workflows, `actions/configure-pages`, `actions/upload-pages-artifact`, and `actions/deploy-pages`.
